max_nodes.description: Maximum number of nodes supported by the offer.

commitment_delay.description: Time period during which you can no longer switch to a lower offer. (in seconds)

sla.description: Value of the Service Level Agreement of the offer.

values.standard: The control plane is rescheduled on other machines in case of failure of a lower layer
values.high_availability: The control plane has replicas to ensure service continuity in case of failure of a lower layer.

memory.description: Max RAM allowed for the control plane. (in bytes)

dedicated.description: Returns information if this offer uses dedicated resources.

audit_logs_supported.description: True if the offer allows activation of the audit log functionality. Please note that audit logs are sent to Cockpit.
